## Feature Summary

<!-- One sentence: what are you proposing? -->

## Problem This Solves

<!-- What AI anti-pattern, architectural gap, or missing standard does this address?
     Be specific. "AI always does X incorrectly when..." is ideal. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the new rule, workflow, or standard.
     If possible, show a ❌ before vs ✅ after example. -->

**❌ Current (no rule):**
```
<!-- What the AI currently produces -->
```

**✅ Proposed (with rule):**
```
<!-- What the AI should produce -->
```

## Target Location

<!-- Where should this live? -->
- [ ] `rules/` — Global constraint (applies to all projects)
- [ ] `tech-stack/` — Framework-specific standard
- [ ] `workflows/` — Execution protocol
- [ ] `EXAMPLES.md` — Behavioral pattern example
- [ ] Other: ___

## Implementation Willingness

- [ ] I am willing to implement this and submit a PR
- [ ] I can help review / provide examples but need someone else to write it
- [ ] I'm just proposing the idea
